topic: multiplying fractions and whole numbers by 2, doubling recipe quantities
latex:
Annabelle's favorite drink is a Blended Mocha Drink. She wants to make two batches. Fill in the following table for how much of each ingredient she will need.

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|}
\hline
\textbf{Batches} & 1 & 2 \\
\hline
espresso (cups) & $\frac{9}{4}$ & \\
\hline
condensed milk (cups) & $\frac{3}{4}$ & \\
\hline
whole milk (cups) & 3 & \\
\hline
ice (pounds) & $\frac{7}{4}$ & \\
\hline
chocolate syrup (cups) & $\frac{5}{8}$ & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
answer_latex: espresso: $4\frac{1}{2}$, condensed milk: $1\frac{1}{2}$, whole milk: $6$, ice: $3\frac{1}{2}$, chocolate syrup: $1\frac{1}{4}$
